candidates.why: Best clean total for current financing debt; excludes non-interest current liabilities. Although lease-related components appear below, this line is the reported total current interest-bearing debt and should be preferred over summing components to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Conceptually fits baseline STD excluding leases, but appears only in older period preview and is zero there; may be unavailable in most years.
Can represent short-term borrowing in some years, but not clearly the complete current debt measure across all years.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: R:nc. Chosen as the best reported current debt total. Manual review because the preview also shows lease-specific current portions, so this total may include leases in some years; however, selecting component rows would risk double counting and no cleaner recurring non-lease current debt total is visible.

candidates.why: Best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.
Tax-related but non-current/deferred, not taxes payable.
Asset, not payable liability.

variables.notes: Label is outside the shortlist, but it is a clear current tax liability/payable line on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact reported PPE line; preferred net/total PPE measure.
Balancing/subtotal style line, less clean than the direct PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease right-of-use asset component, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Selected direct PPE line rather than balancing or lease-related rows.
